title: Field Borders ( FieldBorders)
text: Field Borders ( FieldBorders) This property determines whether all fields on the Grid widget should have borders. True (default) or False . FieldBorders = " True | False " Example: Setting in ProcScript $entityproperties(ENT1) = "FieldBorders=false" Copy Applies To egrid (Grid) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
